allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const src=fs.readFileSync\('src/App.jsx','utf8'\); const br={paren:0,bracket:0,brace:0}; for\(const c of src\){if\(c==='\('\)br.paren++;if\(c==='\)'\)br.paren--;if\(c==='{'\)br.brace++;if\(c==='}'\)br.brace--;if\(c==='['\)br.bracket++;if\(c===']'\)br.bracket--;} console.log\('bracket balance:',br\); console.log\('bytes:',src.length\);")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const s=fs.readFileSync\('src/App.jsx','utf8'\); const b={p:0,k:0,c:0}; for\(const c of s\){if\(c==='\('\)b.p++;if\(c==='\)'\)b.p--;if\(c==='{'\)b.c++;if\(c==='}'\)b.c--;if\(c==='['\)b.k++;if\(c===']'\)b.k--;} console.log\('balance:',b,'bytes:',s.length\);")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax OK'\)")
